strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a related-work sentence on Ferguson and Ross's arXiv sensitivity-analysis set for SC misspecification as a non-published but close working-paper comparator.
State Conjecture 1 with an explicit constant, e.g. the endpoint slope gap along the q-level tangent, and include the analogous lower-endpoint version.
Turn the LP diagnostic into a small algorithm box: inputs (X,b,g,rho,q), tangent construction, two directional LPs, and the reported anisotropy certificate.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0/Stage 1 with Conjecture 1 as the field-level kernel and keep Theorem 1 framed as routine substrate.
